description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style hammer featuring a robust, rectangular metal head with a flat striking face and a pointed, chisel-like end opposite the face. The head is secured with visible bolts and has a matte gray finish, giving it an industrial appearance. A distinctive, angular metal guard or hand shield is attached to one side, likely for added protection or leverage during use. The handle is straight, colored yellow in the upper section, and transitions to a black, ribbed, rubberized grip for enhanced handling and shock absorption. The overall design suggests durability and utility, suitable for heavy-duty urban tasks such as demolition or rescue operations. The hammer appears well-constructed, with no visible signs of wear or damage, and features a small circular logo or marking on the handle.
description: A tactical hammer with a rectangular metal head, pointed end, angular hand guard, and a yellow handle with a black ribbed grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, including the flat striking face, pointed end, and the angular hand guard.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the slim profile of the head and the alignment of the handle and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the head, pointed end, and hand guard.
description_view_3: End-on view from the handle side, showing the circular cross-section of the grip and the alignment of the head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight handle with a yellow upper section and a black, ribbed, rubberized ergonomic grip for enhanced handling.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular steel head with a flat striking face and a pointed, chisel-like end; includes an attached angular metal hand guard.
attribute_brand_or_logo: Small circular logo or marking visible on the handle.
